applicationStrategy.rule: One entity per grant - no duplicate applications
priorityOrder: LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society, Inc.
The The The L.A.W.S. Collective, LLC
applicationStrategy.reasoning: Temple has broadest eligibility as 508(c)(1)(A), followed by LLCs with EINs. Trust is grant-maker not recipient.
applicationStrategy.demographicStrategy: When applying, leverage all applicable demographic categories. A Black woman veteran over 50 can apply to women-focused, minority-focused, veteran-focused, AND elderly-focused grants.
